sources.title: Eegah
sources.description: A caveman is discovered out in the desert who proceeds to fall in love with a girl and then wreak havoc on a nearby town. You can find out more about this film on its IMDB page .

sources.title: Eegah
sources.description: From IMDb : While driving through the desert, a teenage girl is frightened by a seven-foot giant which appears in her path. After escaping, she returns to the site with her boyfriend and her father in an attempt to find the giant. They do, and it proceeds to terrorize them and the rest of Palm Springs, California. Stars: Arch Hall Jr., Marilyn Manning, Richard Kiel, and Arch Hall Sr. The 1GB MPEG4 file was derived from the 2GB MPEG2 found on this page .

sources.title: Eegah
sources.description: This film has fallen into the Public Domain.

sources.title: Eegah (1962) ARCH HALL JR🍕 DRIVE-IN SHLOCKROCKER🍕 HD RESTORATION
sources.description:
🍕NEW HD RESTORATION🍕
It's Friday @PizzaFLIX 
Stars: Arch Hall Jr., Marilyn Manning, Richard Kiel
Director: Nicholas Merriwether (aka Arch Hall Sr.)

A prehistoric caveman emerges from the desert and becomes infatuated with a ravishing teenage girl, leading to a bizarre clash of ancient and modern worlds. This cult classic blends campy thrills, teenage romance, and unforgettable musical numbers in a low-budget adventure that's truly one of a kind.

Get ready for a wild ride into the world of "Eegah," a legendary Drive-in Schlockrocker that embodies the best of cult classics, grindhouse thrills, and trashcan cinema! With Arch Hall Jr.’s rock ‘n’ roll tunes, Marilyn Manning’s captivating charm, and Richard Kiel’s towering presence, Eegah serves up a perfect blend of campy romance, cheesy action, and laugh-out-loud moments that epitomize 1960s drive-in cinema. Don’t miss this slice of cinematic history—like, comment, and subscribe for more cult movie gems!

Subscribe to PizzaFLIX for more HD restorations, rare classic films, and legendary performances that keep the magic of vintage cinema alive!

sources.title: Eegah! (1962) Arch Hall Jr., Marilyn Manning, Richard Kiel | Full Adventure Movie
sources.description:
The Crazed Love of a Prehistoric Giant for a Ravishing Teenage Girl!  Love Breaks the Time Barrier!
Teenagers stumble across a prehistoric caveman, who goes on a rampage & terrorizes them and the rest of Palm Springs, California.

Original title: Eegah (1962) AKA: Eegah! The Name Written in Blood

Director: Arch Hall Sr.
Writers: Bob Wehling, Arch Hall Sr.
Stars: Arch Hall Jr., Arch Hall Sr., Marilyn Manning, Richard Kiel
Genres:  Adventure, Comedy, Cult, Fantasy, Horror, Music
Budget: $15,000

sources.title: 1962 - Eegah, the giant 4K - The Crazed Love Of A Prehistoric Giant For A Ravishing Teen-Age Girl!
sources.description:
When a desert giant falls for a teen queen!  Can a 7-foot crush survive the swinging 60s?
Free-spirited Roxy Miller stumbles upon Eegah - the last prehistoric giant - sparking a rescue mission when her adventurer father vanishes in the dunes. With boyfriend Tom Nelson, she confronts the gentle behemoth in his cave lair... but civilization proves deadlier than the Stone Age.

Original Title: Eegah! (1962)

⭐️ STARRING
Richard Kiel - Eegah (future Bond villain "Jaws")
Arch Hall Jr. - Tom Nelson 
Marilyn Manning - Roxy Miller
Arch Hall Sr. as Robert Miller (under pseudonym William Watters)

🎬 CREW
Directed by Nicholas Merriwether (a.k.a. Arch Hall Sr.)
Written by Bob Wehling
Pulp-tastic score by Arch Hall Jr. (The Choppers https://youtu.be/3gJkN56da2Y)

🎯 WHY WATCH?
🏜️ Prehistoric Romance • 🤪 Tonal Whiplash • 🎸 Desert Ballad Interludes

Bond legend Richard Kiel towers in his first major role as the misunderstood giant!
Surreal musical breaks that'll have you humming in the dunes ✨
Cult classic royalty – like finding a fossilized cheeseburger at an archeological dig!

🔔 SUBSCRIBE @CultCinemaClassics

Cult Classics • Adventure • Sci-Fi • Comedy • Fantasy • Romance

metadata.Plot: While driving through the desert, a teenage girl is frightened by a seven-foot giant which appears in her path. After escaping, she returns to the site with her boyfriend and her father in an attempt to find the giant. They do, and it proceeds to terrorize them and the rest of Palm Springs, California.
